requirement_topic.en: Toppling / Tip-Over Furniture — Mandatory Information Standard and AS 5687 Stability Evidence
requirement_topic.zh: 家具倾倒/翻倒——强制信息标准及AS 5687稳定性证据
requirement_topic.zht: 家具傾倒/翻倒——強制資訊標準及AS 5687穩定性證據

summary.en: The Consumer Goods (Toppling Furniture) Information Standard 2024 is mandatory for covered freestanding household furniture supplied in Australia from 4 May 2025. It applies to clothing storage units and bookcases 686 mm or higher, entertainment units of any height, and hall tables, display cabinets, buffets and sideboards 686 mm or higher. Suppliers must attach permanent warning labels, provide point-of-sale warnings in stores and online, and include toppling-risk information in instruction manuals. For chests, drawers and similar clothing storage units, AS 5687 stability testing or equivalent engineering evidence is a key technical route for demonstrating tip-over risk control, but the mandatory legal instrument is the Australian toppling furniture information standard.
summary.zh: 《Consumer Goods (Toppling Furniture) Information Standard 2024》自2025年5月4日起对在澳大利亚供应的适用独立式家用家具具有强制性。其适用于高度686 mm或以上的衣物收纳单元和书柜、任何高度的电视/娱乐柜，以及高度686 mm或以上的玄关桌、展示柜、餐边柜和边柜。供应商必须粘贴永久警示标签，在实体店及线上销售点提供警示，并在说明书中包含家具倾倒风险信息。对于抽屉柜、斗柜及类似衣物收纳家具，AS 5687稳定性测试或等效工程证据是证明防倾倒风险控制的重要技术路径，但强制性法律文书是澳大利亚家具倾倒信息标准。
summary.zht: 《Consumer Goods (Toppling Furniture) Information Standard 2024》自2025年5月4日起對在澳洲供應的適用獨立式家用家具具有強制性。其適用於高度686 mm或以上的衣物收納單元和書櫃、任何高度的電視/娛樂櫃，以及高度686 mm或以上的玄關桌、展示櫃、餐邊櫃和邊櫃。供應商必須黏貼永久警示標籤，在實體店及線上銷售點提供警示，並在說明書中包含家具傾倒風險資訊。對於抽屜櫃、斗櫃及類似衣物收納家具，AS 5687穩定性測試或等效工程證據是證明防傾倒風險控制的重要技術路徑，但強制性法律文書是澳洲家具傾倒資訊標準。

standards_or_laws: Consumer Goods (Toppling Furniture) Information Standard 2024 — mandatory from 4 May 2025 where in scope
Competition and Consumer Act 2010, Schedule 2 — Australian Consumer Law
AS 5687 — stability / tip-over test evidence route for chests, drawers and similar storage furniture where specified by buyer or risk assessment

summary.en: China's common equivalent evidence includes GB 28481 safety requirements for furniture and GB/T or QB/T structural stability reports for case furniture. These may include stability checks, but they do not automatically satisfy Australia's warning-label, point-of-sale warning, instruction-manual, or AS 5687-style tip-over evidence expectations.
summary.zh: 中国常见对应证据包括GB 28481家具安全要求，以及柜类家具的GB/T或QB/T结构稳定性报告。这些文件可能包含稳定性检查，但不能自动满足澳大利亚警示标签、销售点警示、说明书信息或AS 5687式防倾倒证据预期。
summary.zht: 中國常見對應證據包括GB 28481家具安全要求，以及櫃類家具的GB/T或QB/T結構穩定性報告。這些文件可能包含穩定性檢查，但不能自動滿足澳洲警示標籤、銷售點警示、說明書資訊或AS 5687式防傾倒證據預期。

standards_or_laws: GB 28481 — safety technical requirements for furniture
GB/T 3324 — wooden furniture general technical requirements
QB/T case-furniture stability or strength test reports where used by manufacturers

gap.en: Chinese stability reports usually do not contain the Australian permanent warning label artwork, online and in-store point-of-sale warning copy, instruction manual wording, product-category classification, or AS 5687-aligned tip-over evidence expected by Australian retailers. Covered furniture should be reviewed before shipment because the Australian rule is mandatory from 4 May 2025.
gap.zh: 中国稳定性报告通常不包含澳大利亚永久警示标签图稿、线上及实体销售点警示文案、说明书文字、产品类别判定，或澳大利亚零售商预期的AS 5687对应防倾倒证据。适用家具应在出货前完成审查，因为澳大利亚规则自2025年5月4日起具有强制性。
gap.zht: 中國穩定性報告通常不包含澳洲永久警示標籤圖稿、線上及實體銷售點警示文案、說明書文字、產品類別判定，或澳洲零售商預期的AS 5687對應防傾倒證據。適用家具應在出貨前完成審查，因為澳洲規則自2025年5月4日起具有強制性。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Consumer Goods (Toppling Furniture) Information Standard 2024 applies to covered furniture from 4 May 2025; AS 5687 is a technical stability evidence route or buyer specification, not the standalone legal instrument
mandatory_status.cn: Partly mandatory — GB 28481 may apply to relevant China-market furniture, but Chinese reports do not replace Australian toppling warnings or evidence

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Covered chests, drawers, bookcases and entertainment units need Australian toppling warnings and instructions from 4 May 2025. Treat AS 5687 stability evidence as a high-priority technical file item for chests and drawers, but cite the Consumer Goods (Toppling Furniture) Information Standard 2024 as the mandatory Australian instrument.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 【仅供参考】适用的斗柜、抽屉柜、书柜及电视/娱乐柜自2025年5月4日起需要澳大利亚倾倒警示及说明。应将AS 5687稳定性证据作为抽屉柜和斗柜技术文件的重点项目，但强制性澳大利亚文书应引用《Consumer Goods (Toppling Furniture) Information Standard 2024》。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 【僅供參考】適用的斗櫃、抽屜櫃、書櫃及電視/娛樂櫃自2025年5月4日起需要澳洲傾倒警示及說明。應將AS 5687穩定性證據作為抽屜櫃和斗櫃技術文件的重點項目，但強制性澳洲文書應引用《Consumer Goods (Toppling Furniture) Information Standard 2024》。
